text: Lookup-vs-rule is a property of the WHOLE model, not one layer: every math LM shows a shared FIVE-BAND layered profile across depth - early baseline, a mid surface-form band (strongly negative Cohen's d, e.g. Qwen-7B L20 d=-2.20), a transition, a late abstract-b*c band (d>0), and an assembly tail. The earlier single-layer verdicts collapsed this distributed structure.
